description: A letter in Ladino, possibly to Ya'aqov b. Habib, however, not the same person as the famous author of 'Ayn Ya'aqov. A Ya'aqov b. Habib is also mentioned in the Ladino letter 13J7.30. This letter is dated 1718 CE (15 Elul 5478 AM). The address is then somewhat confusing: "to the sages Alpalas y Sahalon (?), Miṣrayim." It also says "Zurich"(?) in Latin characters along with the date (though this word may be a rendering of the placename Livorno=Liornes/Liornese[?]). Needs further examination. See "Alpalas y Sahalon" tag for other documents from the same group. ASE. MCD.
tags: Ya'aqov b. Habib, Ladino, Cairro, Alpalas y Sahalon, 18th c, Alpalas
description_he: מכתב בלאדינו, ייתכן ליעקב בן חביב. מתוארך 1718 לספירה (ט"ו אלול ה'תע"ח). כתובת: 'לחכמים אלפאלאס י-שאהאלון (?), מצרים'. מילה בלטינית שנראית כ'Zurich' (?). נדרשת בדיקה נוספת. ASE. MCD.
